name: blocked
description: Cannot move until an external decision, access, or dependency is resolved.

name: bug
description: Something documented, generated, or validated is not working as intended.

name: community
description: Contribution idea, Telegram-to-GitHub handoff, or community coordination.

name: dependencies
description: GitHub Actions or tooling dependency maintenance.

name: documentation
description: README, docs, profile, examples, or wording changes.

name: enhancement
description: Public-safe improvement to behavior, packaging, or contributor workflow.

name: good first issue
description: Small, bounded task suitable for a first contribution.

name: instructions
description: GPT Builder Instructions or extracted instruction artifacts.

name: not verified
description: Claim, behavior, or environment result has not been verified.

name: package
description: The 20-file GPT Builder Knowledge package or release ZIP.

name: safety
description: Sandbox honesty, archive safety, secret hygiene, refusal, or injection risk.

name: validation
description: Local validator, CI, Preview test, artifact, or release evidence.
